code: import{createContext,useContext,useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);const getUserFromStorage=()=>{try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('erp-user'))||null;}catch{return null;}};export function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(getUserFromStorage());useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem('erp-user',JSON.stringify(user));},[user]);const login=username=>{const sanitized=username.trim();if(!sanitized)throw new Error('Nom utilisateur requis');setUser({name:sanitized});};const logout=()=>{setUser(null);localStorage.removeItem('erp-user');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{user,login,logout},children:children});}export function useAuth(){const auth=useContext(AuthContext);if(!auth)throw new Error('useAuth doit être utilisé sous AuthProvider');return auth;}
